Before taking the OnVue exam (in my case):

1- Go to Evadus+
2- Settings
3- In "Interception," under Custom Target, add OnVue.exe and save.
4- In "Display," select your preferred screen size.
5- In "Local Resources," add any RDP Username. If you're taking the exam on a virtual machine, check "Raw Physical Hardware" so that the sound and microphone pass from the host to the virtual machine.

6- Check "Setup This PC," and an RDP wrapper configuration will be downloaded.

7- Start Virtual Environment
8- Download OnVue.exe, and before opening it, enable the monitor option.

9- Test it, and if you pass, you're ready to take the exam.
